subject: FW: CampusU $4.50 B Preferred
body:
Jeffrey,
 These are the documents I received from Mike Faber Campus U. Let  me know what you think.
Thanks.
Tommy
 

________________________________

From: Faber, Michael [mailto:MF@nextpointvc.com]
Sent: Fri 2/8/2008 11:15 AM
To: Joanne Oriti; Andi Mathews
Subject: CampusU $4.50 B Preferred


Tommy,
 
Thanks for our meeting yesterday. 
 
As we discussed, for your review, we FedEx'd you the investment documents for the Series B Preferred (same as Kapnick). They also are attached to this email should you wish to forward to counsel or advisors. 
 
Let me know when you have time for us to meet again. Please feel free to call me anytime.
 
Regards,
 
Michael
 
Michael Faber
202-434-7319 w
202-255-6964 c 
202-363-0057 h  <mailto:michael.faber@campusu.com>
